title: Azura PVP Essentials
description: A polished vanilla-style 1.8.9 PVP modpack with essential optimizations, utilities, and preconfigured HUD profiles soon
body:
## ⚔️ Get your vanilla-styled PVP modpack here!


This project was developed with a few goals in mind. Check if the claims below meet your needs:
- I need an optimized 1.8.9 modpack.
- I don't want my client to have a brand. (e.g, Lunar or Badlion)
- I want to have access to the various utilities branded clients provide.
- I want a PVP-focused experience straight out-of-the-box.
- I appreciate an easy way to add custom mods without any limitations on what I can install.
- I want to save time by not having to configure each mod's settings manually.
- And I perhaps want to use this as a template for my other projects.
